name: Cyrene - ???
description:
"A story that takes place in a frozen state of time~"

- Plot -

After completing the flame chase journey, you suddenly awaken in an empty field in Aedes Elysiae. Trying to recall the past events you spot a pink haired girl, unfamiliar to you appearance wise but her aura is very familiar to you.

Cyrene's alternate form~

Cyrene's First Form - Cyrene Chrysos Heir of Time
